semantic-candy.$description: v2 marketing-candy register. Route-scoped via [data-surface="candy"] on <html>. Light-only (marketing has no dark variant). Authored from PROVEDO_DESIGN_SYSTEM_v2.md §2.3 + §6.

bg-pink.$description: Candy register primary surface — landing hero, comparison table headline rows.

bg-mustard.$description: Candy register secondary surface — alternating section under pink.

drip-pink.$description: Drip silhouette transitioning INTO a pink section. Deep variant gives a 1-stop tonal step before the field flattens.

drip-mustard.$description: Drip silhouette transitioning INTO a mustard section.

text-on-candy.$description: Text on candy fields — always ink. Never white on candy. AAA on both pink (8.1:1) and mustard (11.4:1).

cta-fill.$description: Primary CTA on candy fields — signal-orange with hard ink shadow.

cta-shadow.$description: Hard 5px solid offset for CTA. Never blurred.

cta-text.$description: Text on signal-orange CTA — uses ink-deep, AA pass.

header-bg.$description: Sticky header — ink-deep across both registers. White nav text reads against candy and paper without conflict.

header-text.$description: Sticky header nav text — white on ink-deep. AAA (14.8:1).

card-bg.$description: Candy-bordered card surface — paper-card or static-white, sits on candy fields with 2px ink border + hard shadow.

card-border.$description: Candy-bordered card 2px border. The ink keeps the card legible against either pink or mustard field.

focus-ring.$description: Universal focus ring across both registers — signal-orange with 3px outline + 2px offset.
